title: Phlebotomy Technician
description: Stryker, a global leader in medical devices, seeks a Phlebotomy Technician to support our clinical operations and blood collection services in Atlanta. You'll draw blood samples, maintain equipment, and provide excellent patient care. Work onsite in a healthcare setting supporting critical medical work.
responsibilities: Draw blood samples from patients using proper phlebotomy techniques
Label and process blood samples according to protocols
Ensure patient comfort and safety during procedures
Maintain confidentiality and handle sensitive patient information
Document procedures and maintain accurate records

skills: Phlebotomy techniques and safe blood handling
Understanding of HIPAA and patient confidentiality
Ability to work efficiently under pressure
certifications: Phlebotomy certification (may be obtained after hire)

benefits: Paid time off and shift flexibility
